name: kontexta
description: The local Brain (context engine) and Hands (command engine) for AI coding agents. Brain: git-backed markdown vault with FTS5 search, surgical section edits, and token-aware tools. Hands: sandboxed project-defined commands declared in kontexta.json with optional human approval. All over MCP, all on your machine.

KONTEXTA_DATA_DIR.description: Absolute path to the directory where your Knowledge Base and SQLite database are stored.

KONTEXTA_PROJECT_TOKEN_WARN.description: Token count threshold above which the server issues budget warnings.

KONTEXTA_WS_HOST.description: The host the WebSocket server binds to.
